summary: Quantity underage noted but invoice approved. PO-2025-6006 authorised 5x CN-SRV-E2 cloud compute instances; invoice bills 3. GRN-6006-A confirms partial delivery — 2 remaining instances scheduled for next billing cycle per vendor communication. Unit prices, bandwidth, support lines match PO exactly. Underage is expected and documented. Invoice amount USD 5,220.00 is for authorised delivered services only. Auto-approved within vendor's Net 45 terms.

exceptions.description: CN-SRV-E2: PO authorises 5 instances, invoice bills 3. Underage of 2 units = USD 1,160.00 unbilled
exceptions.resolution: Documented partial delivery. Remaining 2 units expected on next invoice cycle.

agent_insights: Underage is informational — vendor confirmed partial delivery via email
All billed lines match PO price exactly — no price variance
